Headline: Temporary Reroute at Kedzie/65th

FullDescription.#cdata-section:

Headline: #4 Cottage Grove Temporary Southbound Reroute near Cottage Grove/76th
ShortDescription: Southbound 4 Cottage Grove buses are temporarily rerouted, due to police activity near Cottage Grove/76th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #4 Cottage Grove buses are temporarily rerouted via Cottage Grove, 76th, King Drive, 79th, Cottage Grove and over regular route due to police activity near Cottage Grove/76th.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
